g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the admin dashboard tech stack')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the client portal')
sendPrompt('How does Stripe billing integrate with the platform?')
sendPrompt('How does Route53 and CloudFront handle client domains?')
sendPrompt('How does the Application Load Balancer route traffic to WordPress sites?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS Cognito handle authentication for admins and clients?')
sendPrompt('What emails does SES send in the platform?')
sendPrompt('Why is a NAT Gateway needed in the VPC?')
sendPrompt('What does the Platform API do and what tech stack does it use?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS Step Functions orchestrate WordPress provisioning?')
sendPrompt('How is each WordPress container isolated per client?')
sendPrompt('How is each WordPress container isolated per client?')
sendPrompt('How is each WordPress container isolated per client?')
sendPrompt('What secrets are stored in AWS Secrets Manager?')
sendPrompt('What Docker images are stored in ECR?')
sendPrompt('How is each client RDS instance isolated?')
sendPrompt('How is each client RDS instance isolated?')
sendPrompt('How is each client RDS instance isolated?')
sendPrompt('How does EFS provide isolated storage per WordPress site?')
sendPrompt('What does the S3 bucket store for each client?')
sendPrompt('What CloudWatch metrics does the platform track?')
sendPrompt('How is CloudTrail used for security auditing?')
sendPrompt('How does Amazon Inspector improve security?')
sendPrompt('How does Datadog complement CloudWatch on this platform?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform manage per-client infrastructure?')
sendPrompt('What does CodePipeline do for dashboard deployments?')
sendPrompt('How are Docker images built and pushed to ECR?')
